page_content:
A traditional presentation of language change. Language types

and families, sounds and writing systems, grammatical categories. Reconstruction of proto-languages by internal and comparative methods. Prerequisite: LING321.

Recommended: LING311.

LING350 Philosophy of Language (3 Credits)

The nature and function of language and other forms of symbolism from a philosophical perspective.

Prerequisite: LING311; or 2 courses in PHIL and (PHIL170 or PHIL370); or permission of ARHU-Philosophy department.

Cross-listed with: PHIL360.
